workspace_invitations_target_check.name: workspace_invitations_target_check
workspace_invitations_target_check.value: "workspace_invitations"."invitedUserId" is not null or "workspace_invitations"."invitedEmail" is not null

trackable_access_grants_subject_check.name: trackable_access_grants_subject_check
trackable_access_grants_subject_check.value:
(
        "trackable_access_grants"."subjectType" = 'user'
        and "trackable_access_grants"."subjectUserId" is not null
        and "trackable_access_grants"."subjectEmail" is null
      ) or (
        "trackable_access_grants"."subjectType" = 'email'
        and "trackable_access_grants"."subjectUserId" is null
        and "trackable_access_grants"."subjectEmail" is not null
      )
